issues.comment: Method isConditionalPasskeysEnabled() is called without parameters, but no such method exists. The available method isConditionalPasskeysEnabled(UserModel) requires a UserModel parameter, causing a compilation error.

Method call `isConditionalPasskeysEnabled()` with no parameters doesn't match any method definition visible in the codebase. Only `isConditionalPasskeysEnabled(UserModel user)` is defined in UsernamePasswordForm.java, causing a compilation error.
